title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Malabar Gold & Diamonds
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!
